title: Delete option is not available in the API for Doc
excerpt: I want to delete Docs from my application but in the API its not available, how can I delete Docs ?

posts.author: manoranjan (Manoranjan)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to delete Docs from my application but in the API its not available, how can I delete Docs ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @manoranjan and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can delete a workdoc with a mutation like this one, passing the ID of the doc as board_id:

mutation{
  delete_board(board_id:1234567890) {
    id
  }
}

In the future we will probably have a dedicated mutation for it, but for now, that solution works.

Cheers,
Matias
